sp_widget.description: Display AI Learning Day sessions with filtering
sp_widget.name: AI Sessions List
sp_widget.template:
Filter Sessions

No sessions found matching your criteria.

{{session.title}}
Time: {{session.start_time}} - {{session.end_time}}
Type: {{session.session_type.display_value || session.session_type}}
Presenter: {{session.presenter}}
Target Roles: {{session.target_roles.display_value || session.target_roles}}
Geo/Area: {{session.geo_major_area.display_value || session.geo_major_area}}
Location: {{session.room_location}}
{{session.description}}
